title: Extracted Catalogue Save Service Routes
summary: Moved Local Studio work-save and work-detail-save catalogue routes from fake in-process `catalogue_write_server.Handler` reuse to callable service functions in `scripts/catalogue/catalogue_write_service.py`.
effect: Work and work-detail saves now use the direct catalogue service boundary while preserving source mutation planning, transaction writes, targeted lookup refresh, field-registry build planning, optional public build follow-through, and Studio Activity behavior.
